description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic silver chassis and a white keyboard. The screen is open and displays a macOS desktop with a mountainous wallpaper, indicating the device is powered on. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY layout with a function row, and the trackpad area is decorated with a distinctive black geometric pattern. The exterior lid is a matte silver-gray with a subtle embossed logo in the center. The laptop's design is minimalist, with no visible ports or stickers except for the patterned trackpad. The overall build suggests a lightweight, portable device suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek silver laptop with a white keyboard, geometric-patterned trackpad, and an open, powered-on screen displaying a macOS desktop. The exterior is minimalist with a subtle logo and no visible ports.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open screen with macOS wallpaper, white keyboard, and black geometric-patterned trackpad.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the matte silver lid with a subtle embossed logo and no visible ports or stickers.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the plain silver lid and the side profile of the laptop, with the patterned trackpad partially visible.
description_view_3: Front-right view showing the open screen, white keyboard, and the full geometric-patterned trackpad.
attribute_brand_logo: A subtle, embossed apple-shaped logo is visible on the center of the laptop lid.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a macOS desktop with a mountain wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad, and white keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: A large black geometric-patterned sticker is placed on the trackpad area.
